raw_title: What Makes for a Good News Experience: Developing a UX Perspective to Advance Audience Studies in Journalism
title_en: What Makes for a Good News Experience: Developing a UX Perspective to Advance Audience Studies in Journalism
title_zh: 什么造就了良好的新闻体验：发展用户体验视角以推进新闻学中的受众研究
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨如何通过用户体验（UX）的视角来改善新闻体验，并推动新闻学中的受众研究。它关注读者如何与新闻互动，以及如何让新闻更易于理解和吸引人。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how to improve news experiences using a user experience (UX) perspective and advance audience studies in journalism. It focuses on how readers interact with news and how to make news more understandable and engaging.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻学中用户体验的应用，以增强受众参与和新闻质量，促进跨学科方法在媒体研究中的整合。
research_direction_en: Investigating the application of user experience in journalism to enhance audience engagement and news quality, promoting interdisciplinary approaches in media research.
